context:
Tweety is a bird. Birds normally fly. 
Penguins are birds. Penguins do not fly. 
Tweety is a penguin.
label: False
formalisations:
PREDICATES:
bird(x) ::: x is a bird
fly(x) ::: x flies
penguin(x) ::: x is a penguin

PREMISES:
bird(tweety)
forall x (bird(x) -> fly(x))
forall x (penguin(x) -> NOT fly(x))
penguin(tweety)

CONCLUSION:
NOT fly(tweety)
